PAID

Positioning

Normal flow paragraph one. The absolute badge should sit at the top-right corner of the content box, over nothing.

Relative box nudged 40pt right and 6pt down.

Paragraph two continues in normal flow exactly where it would have been if the relative box had not been offset at all.

Absolute stamp at top:200pt left:margin, 180pt wide.

Paragraph three flows on, unaffected by the absolute stamp above.

bottom-right
